markets.rules_primary: If Kyle Nelson wins the McKinney vs Nelson professional MMA fight originally scheduled for Mar 28, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The following market refers to the McKinney vs Nelson professional MMA fight originally scheduled for Mar 28, 2026. If this fight is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled fight has finished (within two weeks). If the fight is declared a tie or no contest, the market will resolve to 50/50 for both fighters. If the fight is cancelled or rescheduled to over two weeks away, the market will resolve to a fair price in accordance with the rules.
